name: J P Morgan Chase & Co Depositary Shares each representing a 1/400th interest in a share of 4.625% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series LL
summary: This ticker represents a depositary share, each representing a 1/400th interest in a share of JPMorgan Chase & Co's 4.625% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series LL. It signifies ownership in a specific class of preferred stock issued by JPMorgan Chase & Co, offering a fixed dividend payment.
